name: io.github.dwin-gharibi/arvancloud-mcp
description: Control the whole ArvanCloud platform (Cloud Server, CDN, DNS, Object Storage, VOD, Live) plus a cloud-DevOps toolbox (provisioning, Kubernetes, IaC, security, networking, tasks) over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: ARVAN_ENABLED_SERVICES
environmentVariables.description: Comma list of tool groups to expose, or 'all'.
